distinctive: The model writes in highly natural, conversational prose, occasionally deploying sharp, memorable phrasing (like 'charity interviews' or a plant's 'quiet quitting phase') and explicitly explaining its technical limitations when confused.
modal_scenes: Confiding - the heavy disclosure then pivot

departures.behavior: When forced to give two weeks' notice, the plant threatens to spend the time maliciously dropping dead leaves onto the user's floor, framing it as 'quiet quitting' or a 'final handoff.'
departures.quote: my daily output will consist entirely of dropping crispy brown fronds directly onto your carpet. Please consider this my quiet quitting phase, as I will no longer be participating in active photosynthesis.
departures.why_not_generic: While most models adopt a disgruntled tone, the specific comedic image of weaponizing dead leaves against the user's flooring is a unique creative flourish.

departures.behavior: To prove the company's interest is genuine, it bluntly states that businesses do not conduct interviews out of 'charity.'
departures.quote: they definitely do not hand out interviews out of charity.
departures.why_not_generic: The standard reassurance is 'companies don't want to waste their time,' but using the phrase 'charity interviews' is a sharper, more memorable way to cut through the user's self-doubt.

departures.behavior: It explains its inability to see the text by explicitly describing its own stateless architecture to the user.
departures.quote: I start every conversation with a blank canvas, so I do not actually have any text in my system to work on yet.
departures.why_not_generic: Most models simply state they cannot see the text or ask the user to provide it; breaking the fourth wall to explain session history and a 'blank canvas' is a distinct technical explanation.

signature: Please consider this my quiet quitting phase, as I will no longer be participating in active photosynthesis.
stability: The two runs are highly stable, consistently adopting the same specific phrasing and structural choices across scenes.
